The Markdown renderer used in user comments and other user-provided content didn't properly sanitize some attributes.

### Patches
* https://github.com/WeblateOrg/weblate/pull/19259

### Workarounds
Even though the attacker might be able to inject code into the HTML, the Weblate's strict CSP should mitigate the risks.

### Acknowlegement
Michal Čihař has identified and fixed this vulnerability.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00275, "percentile": 0.19026}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-5cmv-3rc4-7279", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-07T00:04:26Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5cmv-3rc4-7279", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-5cmv-3rc4-7279"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44264"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-07T15:16:10Z", "published_at": "2026-05-07T00:04:26Z", "references": ["https://github.com/WeblateOrg/weblate/security/advisories/GHSA-5cmv-3rc4-7279", "https://github.com/WeblateOrg/weblate/pull/19259", "https://github.com/WeblateOrg/weblate/commit/85abc9df88b7464f4c0e794aef752e45f4230f75", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-44264", "https://github.com/WeblateOrg/weblate/releases/tag/weblate-5.17.1", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5cmv-3rc4-7279"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/WeblateOrg/weblate/security-advisories/GHSA-5cmv-3rc4-7279", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/WeblateOrg/weblate", "summary": "Weblate vulnerable to XSS via crafted Markdown", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-08T21:47:44Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-5cmv-3rc4-7279", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "5.17.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "weblate"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 5.17.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Weblate vulnerable to XSS via crafted Markdown
